findings.location: s1 (本ページの構成) — index entries and source TOC
findings.description: Three sections listed in the source TOC are entirely absent from the knowledge file: `other_example_code_get` (コード値の取得方法), `other_example_code_validate` (コード値のバリデーション方法), and `other_example_warn_message` (警告メッセージの表示方法). The automated pre-check reports 15 source headings vs. 7 knowledge sections, consistent with at least 3 missing sections. No s8/s9/s10 sections exist in the knowledge file for these topics.

findings.description: Section s6 code example explicitly calls `MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, ...)` but neither `MessageUtil` nor `MessageLevel` appear in the s6 hints array.
